title: ExModifier
description: This is a highly configurable magic modification module for weapon equipment and accessory entries
body:
# ExModifier - Enhance Your Gear and Expand Your Experience

Welcome to ExModifier! This is a Forge-based mod designed to add depth and variety to your Minecraft adventures. By introducing a new trait system, ExModifier allows you to equip your weapons, armor, and accessories with a wide array of enhancements. Whether it's refining or set effects, customization has never been more personalized and versatile.

**Course**:[https://github.com/catmoon233/ExModifier/wiki](https://github.com/catmoon233/ExModifier/wiki)
## Key Features:
- **Trait Customization:** Configure traits to include settings such as weight, limiting to specific items, items with certain tags, trait types, attribute sets, and random attribute counts.
- Detailed Attribute Editing: Each attribute can be further customized with options like UUID, name, value, operation mode, auto UUID, and auto name functionalities.
- **Automatic Slot Matching:** Traits can automatically match to the appropriate equipment slots, except for accessories.
- Set Effects: Define specific traits that trigger set effects, including 1-10 piece set bonuses with effects such as potion effects and attribute boosts.
- **Highly Configurable:** The reforging process can be customized in the configuration files to meet different user needs and supports compatibility with other mods like the Apotheosis mod.
- **Future Prospects:** Plans to develop this mod as an API platform for other mod developers to create official additional traits with unique effects.
- **Target Audience:**
Players who seek deeper gear systems
Gamers looking to implement more strategic gameplay
Mod enthusiasts wanting to add more fun to their servers or single-player games

Note: Please read the documentation before using this mod to understand all available features and configuration options.
